title: Customer Profile Update Functionality
description: As a registered customer, I want to update my profile details so that my account information remains accurate and up to date.

business_requirements.description: System must allow customers to update first name, last name, phone number, and address.
Email address must remain unique across all customer accounts.
Profile changes must be saved immediately after successful validation.
Audit logs must capture all profile update activities.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Customer can successfully update profile details.
Validation errors are displayed for invalid inputs.
Updated profile data is reflected immediately after saving.
Audit logs are generated for every profile update.

validation_rules.rule: Phone number must contain exactly 10 digits.

workflow.step: Customer navigates to Profile Settings page.
System saves the updated profile details.

dependencies: Customer database service must be available.
Authentication service must validate active user session.
Audit logging service must be enabled.

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Profile update API response time must be below 2 seconds.
System must support 5,000 concurrent profile update requests.
All customer data must be encrypted during transmission.
